## Parent
Reference: PORTFOLIO_V2_PRD.md

## What to build
Add hover animations to project cards and image zoom functionality within the project modal for enhanced user interactions.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] ProjectCard hover effects:
  - Subtle shadow/glow increase
  - Slight scale transform (1.02)
  - Smooth transition (0.2s)
- [ ] ProjectModal image zoom:
  - Hover over images in modal triggers zoom
  - Zoom level: 1.5x to 2x
  - Smooth transition
  - Zoom constrained within modal viewport
- [ ] Button hover states with color shifts
- [ ] Tag filter buttons have interactive feedback
- [ ] Skills items have hover effects
- [ ] All animations use CSS transitions (no heavy JS libraries)
- [ ] Performance optimized (no layout thrashing)
- [ ] Mobile touch interactions considered
- [ ] Consistent animation timing across all components

## Blocked by
Issue #009 (Project Detail Modal)
